title: Premium 3D Solar Energy Single-Page Website

requirements.text: Implement a full-page dark mode visual theme using deep charcoal (#0d0d0d, #1a1a2e) as base colors, Electric Blue (#00bfff) and Solar Gold (#ffd700) as accent colors. Apply glassmorphism styling (backdrop-filter blur, semi-transparent backgrounds, subtle border highlights) consistently to all UI cards and panels across the site.

quotes: Dark Mode aesthetic with deep charcoal and 'Electric Blue/Solar Gold' accents

acceptanceCriteria: Page background uses deep charcoal tones throughout
Electric Blue and Solar Gold accents appear on headings, borders, CTAs, and highlights
All cards use backdrop-filter blur with semi-transparent backgrounds and glowing borders
Theme is consistent across all sections

requirements.text: Build a Hero section featuring: (1) a 3D rotating solar panel or glowing sun model rendered with Three.js via React Three Fiber as the focal visual element, (2) an animated star-field or energy-grid particle effect as the background, (3) a catchy headline such as 'Power Your Future with Clean Solar Energy', and (4) a prominent 'Request Quote' call-to-action button styled with Electric Blue/Solar Gold accent and glassmorphism.

quotes: hero section featuring a 3D rotating solar panel or a glowing sun model using Three.js
background should have a subtle, animated star-field or energy-grid effect
Hero: Catchy headline, 'Request Quote' CTA, and the 3D focal point

acceptanceCriteria: Three.js/R3F canvas renders a continuously rotating 3D solar panel or sun sphere in the hero
Animated star-field or energy-grid fills the hero background
Headline text is prominent and visually compelling
'Request Quote' CTA button is clearly visible with accent color styling and hover effect
Hero section is full viewport height and responsive

requirements.text: Implement an Interactive Stats section with animated count-up counters for at least: 'Energy Saved (MWh)', 'CO2 Reduced (tons)', 'Homes Powered', and 'Years of Experience'. Counters should animate from zero to their target value when the section scrolls into view using an Intersection Observer.

quotes: Interactive Stats: Use counters for 'Energy Saved' and 'CO2 Reduced'

acceptanceCriteria: At least four stat counters are displayed in a responsive grid
Each counter animates from 0 to its final value when scrolled into view
Animation triggers only once per page load
Stats are displayed inside glassmorphic cards with accent color values

requirements.text: Build a Product Showcase section displaying a responsive grid of at least 4 premium solar panel product cards. Each card must include a product image (using the generated assets), product name, short description, key spec (e.g., wattage/efficiency), and a hover-glow effect using Electric Blue or Solar Gold box-shadow animation.

quotes: Product Showcase: A grid of premium solar panels with hover-glow effects

acceptanceCriteria: Grid displays at minimum 4 product cards in a 2 or 4-column responsive layout
Each card has a product image, name, description, and a key specification
Hovering a card triggers a glowing border/shadow effect in Electric Blue or Solar Gold
Cards use glassmorphism styling consistent with overall theme

requirements.text: Implement a Savings Calculator section with an interactive slider component. The calculator should accept inputs for monthly electricity bill amount and roof size (or number of panels) via sliders, and display estimated monthly savings, annual savings, and CO2 offset in real-time as sliders are adjusted. All calculations are performed client-side.

quotes: Savings Calculator: A clean, functional-looking slider component

acceptanceCriteria: At least two range sliders are present for relevant inputs (e.g., bill amount, roof area)
Output values (monthly savings, annual savings, CO2 offset) update in real-time as sliders move
Slider track and thumb are styled with accent colors
Calculator is contained within a glassmorphic card
No backend calls are made; all logic is frontend-only

requirements.text: Build a minimalist glassmorphic Contact/Footer section containing: a contact form with Name, Email, and Message fields plus a submit button; company contact details (phone, email, address placeholders); social media icon links; and a copyright line. The entire footer must use glassmorphism styling and Electric Blue/Solar Gold accents.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form includes Name, Email, Message fields and a styled Submit button
Footer contains placeholder contact info and social icons
Footer background uses glassmorphism (backdrop blur, semi-transparent panel)
Copyright line is present at the bottom
Section is fully responsive

requirements.text: Ensure the entire single-page layout is fully responsive across mobile (320px+), tablet (768px+), and desktop (1280px+) breakpoints. Implement smooth scroll navigation between sections. Add entrance animations (fade-in, slide-up) for section content as they enter the viewport using CSS transitions or a lightweight animation approach.

quotes: Ensure the code is fully responsive, clean
includes the necessary CDNs for animations (like Framer Motion or AOS)

acceptanceCriteria: Layout reflows correctly at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths
Navigation links scroll smoothly to target sections
Sections animate into view on scroll (fade/slide entrance effect)
No horizontal overflow or broken layouts at any tested breakpoint

requirements.text: Add a sticky top navigation bar with the SolarPeak Energy logo/wordmark, section anchor links (Home, Stats, Products, Calculator, Contact), and a 'Get a Quote' button. The navbar must use glassmorphism, become more opaque on scroll, and collapse into a hamburger menu on mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar is sticky and visible at the top during scroll
All section anchor links are present and functional
'Get a Quote' button is styled with accent color
Navbar background transitions to higher opacity on scroll
Hamburger menu appears and functions correctly on mobile viewports

constraints: All logic and state must remain on the frontend; no backend canister state is required for this UI-only application
3D rendering must use Three.js via React Three Fiber
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Dark mode is mandatory — no light mode toggle required
nonGoals: User authentication or Internet Identity login
Backend data persistence or canister storage
Real payment or quote submission processing

required: Photorealistic premium monocrystalline solar panel, dark blue cells, silver frame, angled perspective view on dark background (solar-panel-hero.dim_800x600.png)
Close-up of glossy black solar panel surface with Electric Blue grid lines, studio lighting (product-panel-1.dim_600x400.png)
Sleek all-black solar panel with gold trim accents, premium aesthetic on dark background (product-panel-2.dim_600x400.png)
Large format commercial solar panel array, white frame, dark blue cells, aerial perspective (product-panel-3.dim_600x400.png)
Bifacial transparent solar panel with glowing edges on dark charcoal background (product-panel-4.dim_600x400.png)
Abstract glowing sun sphere with corona energy rays in Electric Blue and Solar Gold on black background (sun-orb-3d.dim_512x512.png)
SolarPeak Energy wordmark logo with solar icon in Electric Blue and Solar Gold on transparent background (logo-solarpeak.dim_400x100.png)
